heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 950aaa–5 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this chapter $82,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2023.
notes: Termination of SectionFor termination of section by , see Termination of Chapter note set out under .section 1(b) of Pub. L. 102–551section 950aaa of this title
